fact.big: 85% of partners are satisfied. 55% of men are with themselves.

stat.sr: 91 percent think they are too small. only 2 percent actually are.
stat.line91: this many think they are too small.
stat.source: veale et al., bju international, 2015. n=15,521

move.big: more people think this than you think.
move.note: free. forever. without us measuring you.

reducedStat.big: 91% think they are too small. only 2% actually are.
reducedStat.source: veale 2015 / lever 2006. average 13 cm, 95% of all men between 9.8 and 16.4 cm.
